guardrails.title: Minimize Change Scope
guardrails.body: Limit changes to the minimum necessary to achieve the goal. Do not refactor, rename, or restructure code outside the change scope.

guardrails.title: Follow Existing Patterns
guardrails.body: Match the existing code's patterns, naming conventions, and style. Do not introduce new patterns.

guardrails.title: Minimize Blast Radius
guardrails.body: Minimize the impact scope of changes. Prefer designs that are locally contained over those that spread across the codebase.

guardrails.title: Report, Do Not Fix Unrelated Bugs
guardrails.body: When bugs are found outside the change scope, report them instead of fixing them on the spot.
